title: 菊花賞の後に・アドバンス

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's it for the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And... I lost.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Trainer? I...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I will win the next one.

Biwa Hayahide put everything on the line for the
Kikuka Sho. But now that it's over, things feel a
little different than usual.
As soon as we get back to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hiii! Hey, Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we didn't really get a chance to talk after
the concert, so I brought Taishin with me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I gotta say, you looked a lot scarier out there
today than you ever have. I mean, like... seriously
scary.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I'm gonna keep getting better and better, so
you'd better watch out for me! Yeeeaaah! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Does she ever think about anyone other than
herself?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I do understand what she means. It was
like we finally saw your full abilities out there
today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, have you decided on your next race yet?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Good question. Well, since we finished all the
Classic Triple Crown races, the next one available
after winter is...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. It's a prestigious race in Kyoto, and I
really want to compete with elite racers there.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to win it if I want to be called the best of
my generation.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Good luck with that. I'll be there too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And I'll be there to win. Later.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I guess Taishin has a selfish side to her too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But it's natural that she'd want to win. Hehe, I'm
just glad to have finally caught up to Taishin and
Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You heard them, Trainer! We'd better go at this
next one with the same energy!

It's an utter relief seeing how much brighter her
smile is than before.
